notableEvents.label: Otto Lopez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Liam Hicks out at 2nd. Otto Lopez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Stowers plunked
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Stowers hit by pitch. Otto Lopez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Liam Hicks plunked
notableEvents.detail: Liam Hicks hit by pitch. Javier Sanoja to 2nd.
